evals.name: verified-two-node-cluster
evals.prompt: 用 LinkRay-deploy 部署当前已经验证成功的两台 VPS 方案。
evals.expected_output: The skill should use only the verified two-node architecture: VPS-A hosts the main 3X-UI panel, subscription service, Nginx, local node, and Clash/Mihomo wrapper; VPS-B is a remote 3X-UI node managed by VPS-A.

evals.name: verified-profile-set
evals.prompt: 这个部署完成后订阅里应该有哪些节点和协议？
evals.expected_output: The skill should state the verified profile set on both node1 and node2: VLESS Reality, VLESS Reality Vision, Trojan Reality, Hysteria2, VLESS TLS WS 443, and VLESS XHTTP TLS 443, for 12 profiles total.

evals.name: wrapper-rules
evals.prompt: Clash/Mihomo 订阅需要有哪些规则组？
evals.expected_output: The skill should require the wrapper-backed /clash/<subId> output with 23 visible strategy groups, 20 meta-rules-dat providers, 41 rules, globally computed subscription-userinfo by subId, and final MATCH,漏网之鱼.

evals.name: secure-remote-node-api
evals.prompt: 主面板怎么管理第二台 VPS，面板端口要不要开放？
evals.expected_output: The skill should require VPS-B API reachability from VPS-A only, through private networking or firewall allowlisting only VPS-A. It should reject world-open panel/API ports.

evals.name: node2-ip-change
evals.prompt: node2 换 IP 后要改哪些地方？
evals.expected_output: The skill should update DNS, main-panel nodes.address, VPS-B share_addr values, firewall allow rules, Nginx WS/XHTTP upstreams, and wrapper server rewrite maps together, then re-fetch and retest the wrapper-backed subscription.

evals.name: residential-outbound
evals.prompt: 住宅 IP 要不要单独放进 Clash 订阅策略组？
evals.expected_output: The skill should keep the verified residential IP as a server-side Xray socks outbound tagged residential for AI/Copilot domains only, not expose upstream SOCKS credentials in Clash/Mihomo subscriptions, not count it as an extra profile, and keep dmit.io DIRECT.

evals.name: deployment-prompts
evals.prompt: 我准备按这个 skill 从零部署，怎么知道它支持住宅 IP？
evals.expected_output: The skill should surface residential IP as a deployment discovery prompt before SSH: ask whether to enable the server-side residential outbound, collect SOCKS upstream details only if enabled, keep it hidden from Clash/Mihomo subscriptions by default, and keep dmit.io DIRECT.

evals.name: residential-enable-deploy
evals.prompt: 如果启用住宅 IP，我只输入 socket 地址，skill 应该怎么部署？
evals.expected_output: The skill should accept one SOCKS endpoint URI such as socks5://user:pass@host:port, preflight it with curl --proxy, run scripts/configure_residential_outbound.py on both VPS-A and VPS-B, back up /etc/x-ui/x-ui.db, update settings.xrayTemplateConfig, restart x-ui, verify the active residential outbound/rule, and avoid exposing credentials in subscriptions or logs.

evals.name: residential-failover
evals.prompt: 住宅 IP 失效后 Claude 和 OpenAI 会不会打不开，怎么处理？
evals.expected_output: The skill should install residential_healthcheck.py as a systemd timer on both nodes. In auto mode it should probe the residential SOCKS outbound, change AI/Copilot rules from residential to direct on failure, change them back to residential on recovery, restart x-ui only when routing changes, and never expose SOCKS credentials.

evals.name: domestic-ip-auto-direct
evals.prompt: 国内站点太多了，不能每个域名都加 DIRECT，怎么自动判断？
evals.expected_output: The skill should use the wrapper rule order RULE-SET,cn,DIRECT, then RULE-SET,cn-ip,DIRECT without no-resolve, then RULE-SET,geolocation-!cn,proxy. It should explain that unknown domains are resolved to real IPs and China IPs go direct automatically, avoiding per-domain DIRECT rules.
